items.title: Dow Jones Industrial Average tags a record, then hides behind its dullest stocks

items.title: New Zealand Dollar weakens as Middle East tensions lift US Dollar ahead RBNZ hike
items.summary: NZD/USD trades around 0.5685 at the time of writing on Tuesday, down 0.26% on the day.

items.summary_ko: NZD/USD는 화요일 작성 당시 약 0.5685 달러에 거래되며, 당일 0.26% 하락했습니다.
